notes: Moved nav_ink runtime sprites into assets/resources/sprites/ui_families/common/nav_ink and verified the three btn_primary_* files exist.
Moved paper_utility runtime sprites into assets/resources/sprites/ui_families/common/paper_utility and verified the three btn_primary_* files exist.
Moved warning runtime sprites into assets/resources/sprites/ui_families/common/warning and verified the three btn_primary_* files exist.

details: Generate shadow and noise textures into common/shadow and common/noise
notes: Generated runtime texture set for shadow/noise: shadow/shadow_01.png, noise/metal_noise_256.png, noise/paper_noise_256.png.

details: Update lobby-main-default to use nav_ink button-skin
notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/skins/lobby-main-default.json: added family slot ui-common-ink.nav.primary and converted lobby.nav.btn from color to button-skin using nav_ink btn_primary_{normal,pressed,disabled} with border [20,20,20,20].

details: Update duel-challenge-default to use paper_utility for reject/utility buttons
notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/skins/duel-challenge-default.json: added family slot ui-common-paper.utility.primary and converted duel.btn.reject from color to button-skin using paper_utility btn_primary_{normal,pressed,disabled} with border [20,20,20,20].

details: Add parchment color and shadow tokens for light-surface UI families
notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/ui-design-tokens.json with surfaceParchmentFill, textOnParchment, dividerOnParchment, shadowDefault.

details: Align duel.btn.accept to ui-common-metal.equipment.primary for duel-challenge mixed-family target
notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/skins/duel-challenge-default.json: added ui-common-metal.equipment.primary and converted duel.btn.accept to equipment button-skin using btn_primary_{normal,pressed,disabled} with border [20,20,20,20].

details: Add light-surface label variants with outline disabled
notes: Added bodyOnParchment / labelOnParchment presets and wired UISkinResolver to read typography presets via label-style.style.

details: Add selected state support for button-skin with normal fallback
notes: Updated UISpecTypes, UISkinResolver, and UIPreviewBuilder. button-skin now accepts selected, caches a selected fallback, and exposes setButtonVisualState() for panels.

details: Validate all shared button family sprites use border [20,20,20,20] and remain compatible with current button heights
notes: Added tools_node/validate-button-family-borders.js and integrated it into tools_node/run-acceptance.js. Current shared family usages pass border [20,20,20,20] validation with validatedSlots=6.

details: Add shadow slots to skins that need layered frame support

Added lobby.navbar.shadow, duel.root.shadow, popup.card.shadow, netstat.icon.shadow, toast.shadow and passed tools_node/run-acceptance.js.

Added detail.root.shadow, general.list.shadow, general.info.shadow, quickview.shadow, card.shadow, shop.tabs.shadow, gacha.banner.shadow and passed tools_node/run-acceptance.js.

details: Add shadow slots to battle and system skins: battle-hud, battle-log, deploy-panel, unit-info-panel, action-command, tiger-tally, style-check
notes: 2026-03-31 completed third-wave shadow slots for battle-hud-default, battle-log-default, action-command-default, deploy-panel-default, unit-info-panel-default, tiger-tally-default, and style-check-default. Added hud.topbar.shadow, log.root.shadow, action.ultimate.shadow, deploy.root.shadow, unitinfo.root.shadow, tally.card.shadow, sandbox.main.shadow and passed tools_node/run-acceptance.js.

details: Define reusable item-cell skin fragment with rarity border mapping
notes: Fixed item-cell-default.json v2: replaced placeholder paths (equipment/cell_frame_normal, shadow/item_shadow) with correct paths. item.cell.bg=item_cell/bg, item.cell.frame=item_cell/border_common, item.cell.bleed=bleed/bleed_dark, item.cell.shadow=shadow/shadow_01. Added 7 rarity.*.border slots (common/uncommon/rare/epic/legendary/artifact/special), rarity.default.bg color-rect, and parchment.text.* label-style slots. All sprite paths verified to exist. acceptance full green.

details: Define reusable common-parchment skin fragment for light-surface panels
notes: 2026-03-31 完成：common-parchment-default.json v2 修正 sprite 路徑（ui-spec/placeholders/bg_ink_main → parchment/frame; overlay/noise_medium → noise/paper_noise_256; bleed → bleed/bleed_parchment），新增 parchment.text.primary/secondary/accent (outlineWidth=0, 深褐文字) 與 parchment.divider。R2/R4 合規，run-acceptance 全綠。

details: Add automatic shadow layer rendering to UIPreviewBuilder
notes: 2026-03-31：已補上 `UIPreviewBuilder` 的 shadow runtime，完成 container + skinSlot 背景處理、shadow slot 自動推導、非 Layout parent 的 shadow sibling，以及 detached shadow host。`node tools_node/run-acceptance.js` 全綠；剩餘缺口集中在 legacy support-card schema 與人工 preview QA，後續由 UI-2-0016 接續。CLOSED: shadow runtime fully operational, layout-safe detached shadow host in place, validate-skin-contracts 38/38 PASS, run-acceptance full green.

details: Add noise overlay blending support to UIPreviewBuilder
notes: 2026-03-31 completed noise overlay runtime support in UIPreviewBuilder. Added *.noise slot handling with standalone alpha overlay panels, wired the first consumer in general-detail-default, and verified with node tools_node/run-acceptance.js plus node tools_node/validate-skin-contracts.js.

details: Finish popup/layout-safe/legacy shadow coverage in UIPreviewBuilder
notes: 2026-03-31：已完成 layout-safe detached shadow host，補齊 parent 含 Layout 的 battle-log / tiger-tally 類 shadow 覆蓋；popup 類 case 也確認不再是 runtime blocker。剩餘待收斂項為 legacy support-card schema 與人工 preview QA。CLOSED: popup/Layout shadow coverage confirmed via acceptance. Human preview QA is a remaining D-phase item and does not block closure.
